claimItems.claimText: Benchmark Botanical Supplement Capsule preserves direct_use_supplement screening context at 1.02857143 mg/kg-day.

evidenceItems.methodDescription: Adult Traditional Chinese Medicine pill case covering medicinal direct-use oral routing semantics and deterministic tablet-mass arithmetic.

assumptions.name: use_amount_per_event
assumptions.rationale: Product amount per event was supplied directly in grams.

assumptions.name: product_mass_g_per_event
assumptions.rationale: Mass-based use amount already represents product mass per event.

assumptions.name: concentration_fraction
assumptions.rationale: Chemical fraction in the product was supplied explicitly.

assumptions.name: use_events_per_day
assumptions.rationale: Use frequency was supplied explicitly.

assumptions.name: chemical_mass_mg_per_event
assumptions.rationale: Product mass per event multiplied by concentration fraction.

assumptions.name: dosage_unit_count_per_event
assumptions.rationale: Discrete dosage-unit count per event was supplied explicitly.

assumptions.name: dosage_unit_mass_g
assumptions.rationale: Discrete dosage-unit mass was supplied explicitly.

assumptions.name: dosage_unit_label
assumptions.rationale: Discrete dosage-unit label was supplied explicitly.

assumptions.name: product_mass_from_dosage_units_g_per_event
assumptions.rationale: Dosage-unit event mass = dosage-unit count x dosage-unit mass.

assumptions.name: chemical_mass_mg_per_unit
assumptions.rationale: Per-unit chemical mass = dosage-unit mass x concentration fraction.

assumptions.name: body_weight_kg
assumptions.rationale: Body weight was supplied explicitly for dose normalization.

assumptions.name: ingestion_fraction
assumptions.rationale: Ingestion fraction defaulted from application_method='direct_oral' and product_category='herbal_medicinal_product'.

source.title: EMA scientific guideline for well-established and traditional herbal medicinal products

assumptions.name: external_mass_mg_per_day
assumptions.rationale: Oral external mass = chemical mass per event x events/day x ingestion fraction.

assumptions.name: normalized_external_dose_mg_per_kg_day
assumptions.rationale: Normalized external dose = external mass per day / body weight.
